positive: A stylized, graphic depiction of a cosmic celestial journey. Main subject: A crescent moon made of glowing nebula dust, surrounded by abstract, swirling galaxies and vibrant star trails. Elements should include subtle, geometric representations of planets in various orbits (like Jupiter, Saturn, Earth, depicted abstractly), connected by thin, elegant arcs of light. The overall composition should be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and high contrast, featuring deep indigo, brilliant cyan, ethereal magenta, and popping gold accents. Use a clean, retro-futuristic, mid-century atomic poster art style with crisp lines and minimal shading. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. Perfect for a central, impactful design. Minimalist, vector-like aesthetic, 4k, print-ready.
